posts.text:
American tax dollars should never be used for:

-Fake daycares in Minnesota

-Welfare services for criminal illegal aliens

-Spying on parents at school board meetings

This is common sense to everyone but Democrats.

House Republicans subpoena prosecutor for records tied to Stephen Miller protester
washingtonpost.com/politics/…

Colin McDonald is the right guy for the job.

He will protect American tax dollars, crack down on rampant fraud in Democrat-run states, and restore accountability as Assistant Attorney General of Fraud Enforcement.

Democrat-run Virginia:

-Sanctuary cities and jurisdictions

-Soft on crime

-Raising taxes on families

-Trying to infringe Americans' Second Amendment rights

Democrats let millions of illegal aliens into the country.

And America wants honest elections.

Voter ID is common sense.

SAVE AMERICA!

First March Madness win in 27 years.

Incredible!

foxnews.com/sports/miami-ohi…

Fund DHS.

Protect the homeland.

End the Democrats' shutdown.

President Trump is making life more affordable for Americans everyday. 

Just like he promised.


Karoline Leavitt (@PressSec)

MUST WATCH video of President Trump discussing the two strong executive orders he recently signed to improve housing affordability:

"Under the Trump Administration, we want to make it possible for every American to live that American Dream in a beautiful home." - @POTUS 

🏡🇺🇸

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/PressSec/status/2034279874806870265#m

Democrats think voter ID is “despicable."

What's wrong with making sure only citizens vote in American elections?

Hours long TSA lines.

Families going without pay.

Now, even airline CEOs are demanding Democrats end their DHS shutdown.
